about.title: About
about.heading: Your football, your friends, five top leagues
about.subtitle: Fantasy MX is the free platform where you follow Liga MX, the Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A and the Bundesliga live, build your fantasy team with a real-time draft, and compete against your friends in pools and Survivor.

intro.heading: What is Fantasy MX?
intro.p1: Fantasy MX was born out of a passion for football. We bring together everything a fan wants in one place: standings, fixtures, live results, and team and player stats for five top leagues: Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A and Bundesliga. All in a fast, clean design built for mobile.
intro.p2: But we don't stop at following matches: we turn every matchday into a game. Build your fantasy team and face your friends in head-to-head duels, predict exact scores in private pools, and manage your lives matchday after matchday in Survivor mode. Every correct call counts, and every week brings a new chance to finish on top.

modes.heading: Game modes
modes.subtitle: Four ways to live every matchday, in the league you choose.

follow.title: Follow your league
follow.desc: Standings, fixtures, live results, and team and player stats for Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A and Bundesliga, updated matchday after matchday.

fantasy.title: Fantasy with live draft
fantasy.desc: Create a league with your friends, pick your players in a live draft and face them every matchday in head-to-head duels. Set your starters, use the FLEX spot and manage your bench.

pool.title: Pools
pool.desc: Predict the exact score of every match and earn points for exact score, correct winner or correct draw. A private, real-time table with your group.

survivor.title: Survivor
survivor.desc: Pick a winning team every matchday without repeating. If it loses, you lose a life; a draw keeps you alive. The last one standing takes the glory.

step1.title: Create your free account
step1.desc: Sign up in seconds with your email or with Google. No cost, no subscriptions.

step2.title: Choose your game mode
step2.desc: Follow your favorite league, create or join a fantasy league, set up a pool, or enter a Survivor with your friends.

step3.title: Compete every matchday
step3.desc: Earn points from your league's real results and climb your group's table week after week.

free.title: 100% free
free.desc: Every game mode is free. No hidden costs, no subscriptions.

mobile.title: Built for mobile
mobile.desc: Install it as an app on your phone (PWA) and take it everywhere.

realtime.title: In real time
realtime.desc: Draft, scores, and standings that update live while you play.

friends.title: With your friends
friends.desc: Create private groups and compete against the people you really want to beat.

responsible.heading: A game for fans
responsible.text: Fantasy MX is a platform for entertainment and friendly competition. The pools, fantasy leagues, and Survivor are games of skill and football knowledge, made to have fun. We protect your data in accordance with Mexican law; you can review how we handle it in our privacy notice.

cta.heading: Ready to play?
cta.text: Create your free account and build your first team, pool, or Survivor today.

about.guidesLink: Read our guides and learn how to play
